blended.narrative: Calabogie Peaks is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,895 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 7" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
